text-unit.text: In all examples we use Iwona scaled 1.15

First some large operators both in text:
∭ 𝒬 𝑓 ( 𝑥 , 𝑦 , 𝑧 ) 𝑑 𝑥 𝑑 𝑦 𝑑 𝑧
$\iiint \limits _{\mathcal {Q}} f(x,y,z)\,dx\,dy\,dz$
∫︁∫︁∫︁Qf(x,y,z)dxdydz
and
∏ 𝛾 ∈ Γ 𝐶 ˜ 𝜕 ( 𝑋 ˜ 𝛾 )
$\prod _{\gamma \in \Gamma _{\widetilde {C}}} \partial (\widetilde {X}_\gamma )$
∏︁γ∈Γ˜︁C∂(˜︁Xγ)
; and also on display:

text-unit.Formula:
⨌ Q 𝑓 ( 𝑤 , 𝑥 , 𝑦 , 𝑧 ) 𝑑 𝑤 𝑑 𝑥 𝑑 𝑦 𝑑 𝑧 ≤ ∮ 𝝏 𝐐 𝑓 ′ ( max { ‖ 𝑤 ‖ | 𝑤 2 + 𝑥 2 | ; ‖ 𝑧 ‖ | 𝑦 2 + 𝑧 2 | ; ‖ 𝑤 ⊕ 𝑧 ‖ ‖ 𝑥 ⊕ 𝑦 ‖ } ) ⪷ ⨄ ℚ ⋐ Q ¯ [ 𝑓 ∗ ( ⎰ ℚ ( 𝑡 ) ⎱ 1 − 𝑡 2 ) ] 𝑡 = 𝛼 𝑡 = 𝜗 − ( Δ + 𝜈 − 𝑣 ) 3
\begin {equation}\begin {split} \iiiint \limits _{\mathbf {Q}} f(w,x,y,z)\,dw\,dx\,dy\,dz &\leq \oint _{\bm {\partial Q}} f' \left ( \max \left \lbrace \frac {\lVert w \rVert }{\lvert w^2 + x^2 \rvert } ; \frac {\lVert z \rVert }{\lvert y^2 + z^2 \rvert } ; \frac {\lVert w \oplus z \rVert }{\lVert x \oplus y \rVert } \right \rbrace \right ) \\ &\precapprox \biguplus _{\mathbb {Q} \Subset \bar {\mathbf {Q}}} \left [ f^{\ast } \left ( \frac {\left \lmoustache \mathbb {Q}(t)\right \rmoustache } {\sqrt {1 - t^2}} \right )\right ]_{t=\alpha }^{t=\vartheta } - ( \Delta + \nu - v )^3 \end {split}\end {equation}
∫︂∫︂∫︂∫︂Qf(w,x,y,z)dwdxdydz≤∮︂∂Qf′(︃max{︃∥w∥|w2+x2|;∥z∥|y2+z2|;∥w⊕z∥∥x⊕y∥}︃)︃ ≾⨄︂Q⋐¯Q⎡⎣f∗⎛⎝⎧⎭Q(t)⎫⎩√1−t2⎞⎠⎤⎦t=θt=α−(∆+ν−v)3
(1)

text-unit.text:
For
𝑥
$x$
x
in the open interval
] − 1 , 1 [
$\left ] -1, 1 \right [$
]−1,1[
the infinite sum in Equation (2) is conver gent; however, this does not hold throughout the closed interval
[ − 1 , 1 ]
$\left [ -1, 1 \right ]$
[−1,1]
.
text-unit.Formula:
(2) ( 1 − 𝑥 ) − 𝑘 = 1 + ∑ 𝑗 = 1 ∞ ( − 1 ) 𝑗 { 𝑘 𝑗 } 𝑥 𝑗 for 𝑘 ∈ ℕ ; 𝑘 ≠ 0 .
\begin {align}(1 - x)^{-k} &= 1 + \sum _{j=1}^{\infty } (-1)^j \ibinom {k}{j} x^j \text {\quad for $k \in \mathbb {N}$; $k \neq 0$.}\end {align}
(1−x)−k=1+∞∑︂j=1(−1)j{︃kj}︃xj for k∈N; k̸=0.
(2)

text-unit.text:
First some large operators both in text:
∭ 𝒬 𝑓 ( 𝑥 , 𝑦 , 𝑧 ) 𝑑 𝑥 𝑑 𝑦 𝑑 𝑧
$\iiint \limits _{\mathcal {Q}} f(x,y,z)\,dx\,dy\,dz$
∫︁∫︁∫︁Qf(x,y,z)dxdydz
and
∏ 𝛾 ∈ Γ 𝐶 ˜ 𝜕 ( 𝑋 ˜ 𝛾 )
$\prod _{\gamma \in \Gamma _{\widetilde {C}}} \partial (\widetilde {X}_\gamma )$
∏︁γ∈Γ˜︁C∂(˜︁Xγ)
; and also on display:

text-unit.Formula:
⨌ Q 𝑓 ( 𝑤 , 𝑥 , 𝑦 , 𝑧 ) 𝑑 𝑤 𝑑 𝑥 𝑑 𝑦 𝑑 𝑧 ≤ ∮ 𝝏 𝐐 𝑓 ′ ( max { ‖ 𝑤 ‖ | 𝑤 2 + 𝑥 2 | ; ‖ 𝑧 ‖ | 𝑦 2 + 𝑧 2 | ; ‖ 𝑤 ⊕ 𝑧 ‖ ‖ 𝑥 ⊕ 𝑦 ‖ } ) ⪷ ⨄ ℚ ⋐ Q ¯ [ 𝑓 ∗ ( ⎰ ℚ ( 𝑡 ) ⎱ 1 − 𝑡 2 ) ] 𝑡 = 𝛼 𝑡 = 𝜗 − ( Δ + 𝜈 − 𝑣 ) 3
\begin {equation}\begin {split} \iiiint \limits _{\mathbf {Q}} f(w,x,y,z)\,dw\,dx\,dy\,dz &\leq \oint _{\bm {\partial Q}} f' \left ( \max \left \lbrace \frac {\lVert w \rVert }{\lvert w^2 + x^2 \rvert } ; \frac {\lVert z \rVert }{\lvert y^2 + z^2 \rvert } ; \frac {\lVert w \oplus z \rVert }{\lVert x \oplus y \rVert } \right \rbrace \right ) \\ &\precapprox \biguplus _{\mathbb {Q} \Subset \bar {\mathbf {Q}}} \left [ f^{\ast } \left ( \frac {\left \lmoustache \mathbb {Q}(t)\right \rmoustache } {\sqrt {1 - t^2}} \right )\right ]_{t=\alpha }^{t=\vartheta } - ( \Delta + \nu - v )^3 \end {split}\end {equation}
∫︂∫︂∫︂∫︂Qf(w,x,y,z)dwdxdydz≤∮︂∂Qf′(︃max{︃∥w∥|w2+x2|;∥z∥|y2+z2|;∥w⊕z∥∥x⊕y∥}︃)︃ ≾⨄︂Q⋐¯Q⎡⎣f∗⎛⎝⎧⎭Q(t)⎫⎩√1−t2⎞⎠⎤⎦t=θt=α−(∆+ν−v)3
(3)

text-unit.text:
For
𝑥
$x$
x
in the open interval
] − 1 , 1 [
$\left ] -1, 1 \right [$
]−1,1[
the infinite sum in Equation (2) is conver gent; however, this does not hold throughout the closed interval
[ − 1 , 1 ]
$\left [ -1, 1 \right ]$
[−1,1]
.
text-unit.Formula:
(2) ( 1 − 𝑥 ) − 𝑘 = 1 + ∑ 𝑗 = 1 ∞ ( − 1 ) 𝑗 { 𝑘 𝑗 } 𝑥 𝑗 for 𝑘 ∈ ℕ ; 𝑘 ≠ 0 .
\begin {align}(1 - x)^{-k} &= 1 + \sum _{j=1}^{\infty } (-1)^j \ibinom {k}{j} x^j \text {\quad for $k \in \mathbb {N}$; $k \neq 0$.}\end {align}
(1−x)−k=1+∞∑︂j=1(−1)j{︃kj}︃xj for k∈N; k̸=0.
(4)

text-unit.text:
First some large operators both in text:
∭ 𝒬 𝑓 ( 𝑥 , 𝑦 , 𝑧 ) 𝑑 𝑥 𝑑 𝑦 𝑑 𝑧
$\iiint \limits _{\mathcal {Q}} f(x,y,z)\,dx\,dy\,dz$
∫︁∫︁∫︁Qf(x,y,z)dxdydz
and
∏ 𝛾 ∈ Γ 𝐶 ˜ 𝜕 ( 𝑋 ˜ 𝛾 )
$\prod _{\gamma \in \Gamma _{\widetilde {C}}} \partial (\widetilde {X}_\gamma )$
∏︁γ∈Γ˜︁C∂(˜︁Xγ)
; and also on display:

text-unit.Formula:
⨌ Q 𝑓 ( 𝑤 , 𝑥 , 𝑦 , 𝑧 ) 𝑑 𝑤 𝑑 𝑥 𝑑 𝑦 𝑑 𝑧 ≤ ∮ 𝝏 𝐐 𝑓 ′ ( max { ‖ 𝑤 ‖ | 𝑤 2 + 𝑥 2 | ; ‖ 𝑧 ‖ | 𝑦 2 + 𝑧 2 | ; ‖ 𝑤 ⊕ 𝑧 ‖ ‖ 𝑥 ⊕ 𝑦 ‖ } ) ⪷ ⨄ ℚ ⋐ Q ¯ [ 𝑓 ∗ ( ⎰ ℚ ( 𝑡 ) ⎱ 1 − 𝑡 2 ) ] 𝑡 = 𝛼 𝑡 = 𝜗 − ( Δ + 𝜈 − 𝑣 ) 3
\begin {equation}\begin {split} \iiiint \limits _{\mathbf {Q}} f(w,x,y,z)\,dw\,dx\,dy\,dz &\leq \oint _{\bm {\partial Q}} f' \left ( \max \left \lbrace \frac {\lVert w \rVert }{\lvert w^2 + x^2 \rvert } ; \frac {\lVert z \rVert }{\lvert y^2 + z^2 \rvert } ; \frac {\lVert w \oplus z \rVert }{\lVert x \oplus y \rVert } \right \rbrace \right ) \\ &\precapprox \biguplus _{\mathbb {Q} \Subset \bar {\mathbf {Q}}} \left [ f^{\ast } \left ( \frac {\left \lmoustache \mathbb {Q}(t)\right \rmoustache } {\sqrt {1 - t^2}} \right )\right ]_{t=\alpha }^{t=\vartheta } - ( \Delta + \nu - v )^3 \end {split}\end {equation}
∫︂∫︂∫︂∫︂Qf(w,x,y,z)dwdxdydz≤∮︂∂Qf′(︃max{︃∥w∥|w2+x2|;∥z∥|y2+z2|;∥w⊕z∥∥x⊕y∥}︃)︃ ≾⨄︂Q⋐¯Q⎡⎣f∗⎛⎝⎧⎭Q(t)⎫⎩√1−t2⎞⎠⎤⎦t=θt=α−(∆+ν−v)3
(5)

text-unit.text:
For
𝑥
$x$
x
in the open interval
] − 1 , 1 [
$\left ] -1, 1 \right [$
]−1,1[
the infinite sum in Equation (2) is conver gent; however, this does not hold throughout the closed interval
[ − 1 , 1 ]
$\left [ -1, 1 \right ]$
[−1,1]
.
text-unit.Formula:
(2) ( 1 − 𝑥 ) − 𝑘 = 1 + ∑ 𝑗 = 1 ∞ ( − 1 ) 𝑗 { 𝑘 𝑗 } 𝑥 𝑗 for 𝑘 ∈ ℕ ; 𝑘 ≠ 0 .
\begin {align}(1 - x)^{-k} &= 1 + \sum _{j=1}^{\infty } (-1)^j \ibinom {k}{j} x^j \text {\quad for $k \in \mathbb {N}$; $k \neq 0$.}\end {align}
(1−x)−k=1+∞∑︂j=1(−1)j{︃kj}︃xj for k∈N; k̸=0.
(6)

text-unit.text:
First some large operators both in text:
∭ 𝒬 𝑓 ( 𝑥 , 𝑦 , 𝑧 ) 𝑑 𝑥 𝑑 𝑦 𝑑 𝑧
$\iiint \limits _{\mathcal {Q}} f(x,y,z)\,dx\,dy\,dz$
∫︁∫︁∫︁Qf(x,y,z)dxdydz
and
∏ 𝛾 ∈ Γ 𝐶 ˜ 𝜕 ( 𝑋 ˜ 𝛾 )
$\prod _{\gamma \in \Gamma _{\widetilde {C}}} \partial (\widetilde {X}_\gamma )$
∏︁γ∈Γ˜︁C∂(˜︁Xγ)
; and also on display:

text-unit.Formula:
⨌ Q 𝑓 ( 𝑤 , 𝑥 , 𝑦 , 𝑧 ) 𝑑 𝑤 𝑑 𝑥 𝑑 𝑦 𝑑 𝑧 ≤ ∮ 𝝏 𝐐 𝑓 ′ ( max { ‖ 𝑤 ‖ | 𝑤 2 + 𝑥 2 | ; ‖ 𝑧 ‖ | 𝑦 2 + 𝑧 2 | ; ‖ 𝑤 ⊕ 𝑧 ‖ ‖ 𝑥 ⊕ 𝑦 ‖ } ) ⪷ ⨄ ℚ ⋐ Q ¯ [ 𝑓 ∗ ( ⎰ ℚ ( 𝑡 ) ⎱ 1 − 𝑡 2 ) ] 𝑡 = 𝛼 𝑡 = 𝜗 − ( Δ + 𝜈 − 𝑣 ) 3
\begin {equation}\begin {split} \iiiint \limits _{\mathbf {Q}} f(w,x,y,z)\,dw\,dx\,dy\,dz &\leq \oint _{\bm {\partial Q}} f' \left ( \max \left \lbrace \frac {\lVert w \rVert }{\lvert w^2 + x^2 \rvert } ; \frac {\lVert z \rVert }{\lvert y^2 + z^2 \rvert } ; \frac {\lVert w \oplus z \rVert }{\lVert x \oplus y \rVert } \right \rbrace \right ) \\ &\precapprox \biguplus _{\mathbb {Q} \Subset \bar {\mathbf {Q}}} \left [ f^{\ast } \left ( \frac {\left \lmoustache \mathbb {Q}(t)\right \rmoustache } {\sqrt {1 - t^2}} \right )\right ]_{t=\alpha }^{t=\vartheta } - ( \Delta + \nu - v )^3 \end {split}\end {equation}
∫︂∫︂∫︂∫︂Qf(w,x,y,z)dwdxdydz≤∮︂∂Qf′(︃max{︃∥w∥|w2+x2|;∥z∥|y2+z2|;∥w⊕z∥∥x⊕y∥}︃)︃ ≾⨄︂Q⋐¯Q⎡⎣f∗⎛⎝⎧⎭Q(t)⎫⎩√1−t2⎞⎠⎤⎦t=θt=α−(∆+ν−v)3
(7)

text-unit.text:
For
𝑥
$x$
x
in the open interval
] − 1 , 1 [
$\left ] -1, 1 \right [$
]−1,1[
the infinite sum in Equation (2) is conver gent; however, this does not hold throughout the closed interval
[ − 1 , 1 ]
$\left [ -1, 1 \right ]$
[−1,1]
.
text-unit.Formula:
(2) ( 1 − 𝑥 ) − 𝑘 = 1 + ∑ 𝑗 = 1 ∞ ( − 1 ) 𝑗 { 𝑘 𝑗 } 𝑥 𝑗 for 𝑘 ∈ ℕ ; 𝑘 ≠ 0 .
\begin {align}(1 - x)^{-k} &= 1 + \sum _{j=1}^{\infty } (-1)^j \ibinom {k}{j} x^j \text {\quad for $k \in \mathbb {N}$; $k \neq 0$.}\end {align}
(1−x)−k=1+∞∑︂j=1(−1)j{︃kj}︃xj for k∈N; k̸=0.
(8)
